title: vicia benghalensis
intro: Vicia benghalensis, also known as the Bengal gram or rice bean, is a type of legume that belongs to the pea family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Vicia benghalensis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, manage diabetes, and aid in weight loss. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or powder, and its extracts are also used in the production of traditional medicines, such as capsules and tablets.
